Bromine
Bromine eliminates bad odors and is especially recommended for heated indoor pools and spas where users may have developed allergies to chlorine; it is less irritating to mucous membranes than other products on the market. Bromine also does not form chloramines but instead produces bromamines, which are disinfectants with a very short decomposition period.
Bromine, CTX-130, eliminates bad odors and is especially recommended for heated indoor pools and spas where users may have developed allergies to chlorine; it is less irritating to mucous membranes than other products on the market. Bromine also does not form chloramines but instead produces bromamines, which are disinfectants with a very short decomposition period.

Cleaning the pool lighting niches
Cleaning the pool lighting niches is essential to maintaining a safe and functional environment. Over time, dirt such as limescale, algae, and other organic debris can accumulate, potentially obstructing the lamps' operation, reducing their efficiency, and contributing to microbiological contamination of the pool water. Regularly cleaning the niches ensures proper lighting, prevents technical issues, and keeps the pool in safe conditions.

EvaluationMode
Even with proper pool disinfection, algae proliferation can still occur due to various factors such as inorganic or organic chemical residues (the latter coming from rain, insects, trees around the pool, etc.), the time of year, or the disinfectant level, among others. Different types of algae can cause and result in green, brown, yellowish, or red water, depending on the type of chlorophyll; they can also lead to intoxication if ingested, create slippery surfaces, and/or cause pool basin deterioration.

Flocculant is responsible for addressing water cloudiness, keeping it clear, bright, and sparkling. Its importance lies in the fact that the water filter cannot retain the miniscule and microscopic particles that cause cloudiness, making its use essential to prevent turbidity. With CTX-1596 Natural Flocculant, CTX-39 Pool Gel or CTX-37 Xtreme Floc, maintaining perfect water will be easy and achievable.
Flocculant is responsible for addressing water cloudiness, keeping it clear, bright, and sparkling. Its importance lies in the fact that the water filter cannot retain the miniscule and microscopic particles that cause cloudiness, making its use essential to prevent turbidity. With Natural Flocculant, Crystalblock or Claritab, maintaining perfect water will be easy and achievable.
Flocculant is verantwoordelijk voor het aanpakken van watertroebelheid, waardoor het helder, helder en sprankelend blijft. Het belang ervan ligt in het feit dat het waterfilter de minuscule en microscopische deeltjes die troebelheid veroorzaken niet kan vasthouden, waardoor het gebruik ervan essentieel is om troebelheid te voorkomen. Met CTX-1596 Natural Flocculant, CTX-39 Pool Gel of CTX-37 Xtreme Floc is het eenvoudig en haalbaar om perfect water te behouden.
Flocculant is verantwoordelijk voor het aanpakken van watertroebelheid, waardoor het helder, helder en sprankelend blijft. Het belang ervan ligt in het feit dat het waterfilter de minuscule en microscopische deeltjes die troebelheid veroorzaken niet kan vasthouden, waardoor het gebruik ervan essentieel is om troebelheid te voorkomen. Met Natural Flocculant, Crystalblock of Claritab is het eenvoudig en haalbaar om perfect water te behouden.

Pool
Pool InfoX
Pool Information
Pool Init Page
Pool chlorine comes in various forms, each suited to specific maintenance and treatment needs. For regular maintenance, slow-release chlorine is used, such as CTX-370 in tablets. For shock treatments or rapid chlorine increases, fast-dissolving chlorine is used, including CTX-200GR (granulated). Additionally, there are multi-action products that combine several functions into a single product: disinfectant, flocculant, algicides and scale prevention, simplifying complete pool water maintenance.
Pool chlorine comes in various forms, each suited to specific maintenance and treatment needs. For regular maintenance, slow-release chlorine is used, such as Chlorine Lent in tablets. For shock treatments or rapid chlorine increases, fast-dissolving chlorine is used, including Chlorine Shock (granulated). Additionally, there are Multiaction products that combine several functions into a single product: disinfectant, flocculant, algicides and scale prevention, simplifying complete pool water maintenance.
